prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-TTX-CLEARWATCHCOFFIN-THINN-2PK-FBA Product Type: JEWELRY_STORAGE Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 2pk Clear Watch Coffin Travel Case Jewelry Organizers and Storage, THIN CASE STYLE Description: Preserve the value, prestige and aesthetic of stainless steel sport or other luxury watches, while traveling stress and worry free, knowing your watch is safe, secure and free of damage. These completely clear watch travel cases or coffins ensure the safe transportation and storage of watches during travel, protecting them from moisture and dust, vibrations, potential scratches or damage to the inner mechanisms.

A must have travel essentials item to keep time pieces safe, these watch coffins feature a double layer protection design; the transparent exterior plastic hard case has been designed to tightly fit the dense polystyrene material inner case. This thoughtful and lightweight design ensures no movement when you’re on the go, adding minimal weight to carry on bags or checked luggage. The clear watch box travel case allows for quick and easy identification of contents, as well as the quick retrieval of stainless steel sport watches when needed.

Compatible with most luxury stainless steel sport and other watches, the clear watch coffin travel case is OEM industry standard, used by luxury watch manufacturers worldwide, and has been designed to provide an added layer of security outside of standard product packaging for travel, storage or shipping. This watch box is durable and easy to open and close, providing a reliable solution for watch protection when traveling. Search Terms: Womens mens watch plastic storage bins travel essentials accessories jewelry organizer watch box coffin winder repair kit jewelry organizers and storage shipping supplies gifts for men boyfriend husband brother luxury watches for men display stand Features: - TRAVEL ESSENTIALS: A must have travel accessories item for luxury watches to keep time pieces safe, secure and free of moisture and dust, vibrations, potential scratches or damage to inner mechanisms - LIGHTWEIGHT SECURE DESIGN: Double layer protection features clear plastic exterior watch box case and dense polystyrene material inner case to ensure no movement when traveling; lightweight construction adds minimal weight to carry on bags or checked luggage - WATCH TRAVEL CASE: Compatible with most luxury stainless steel sport and other watches; watch coffin case is OEM industry standard used by luxury watch manufacturers worldwide, designed to provide additional security outside of standard product packaging - EASY IDENTIFICATION: Entire watch travel case is clear on all sizes, allowing for the quick and easy identification of contents and quick retrieval when needed - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.75 x 2.5 x 1.75 inches; Single Case Weight: 0.20lbs; Material: Plastic Outer Case, Polystyrene Inserts === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 2-pk Clear Watch Coffin Travel Case

anthropic.title_differentiation: Double Layer Protection, Lightweight Design, OEM Industry Standard, Quick Identification, Moisture And Dust Protection
